items.raw_desc: Pingpongütő Donic Top Team 900:        The DONIC Top Team range of table tennis bats is designed for players of various national teams such as Olivier Brice (France), Li Ping (China) and Jakub Dyjas (Poland). The DONIC Top Team 900 table tennis bat is designed for advanced players with a technical game. Thanks to two special soft layers that are laminated between the blade and the handle the bat absorbs shock. As a result, AVS increases accuracy for both defensive and offensive styles of play. The rounded Ergo handle shape prevents pressure in the hand and provides an extremely comfortable and pleasant feeling. The hollow handle of the Power Light system reduces the overall weight of the bat and shifts the centre of gravity towards the head, offering much more power and speed while maintaining a great feel. items.raw_desc: Kapcsoló AQARA Smart Wall Switch H1 (With Neutral, Single Rocker):Az Aqara Smart Wall Switch H1 (Semleges, egy billenővel) Zigbee 3.0 vezeték nélküli protokollal egy intelligens fali kapcsoló egycsatornás relével, amely automatikusan kapcsolhatja a lámpákat és más elektromos eszközöket. Az Aqara Hubhoz csatlakoztatva az Aqara Home mobilalkalmazás vagy a hangalapú asszisztensek segítségével vezérelheted készülékeid.
